segment1.summary: 90-year-old woman with esophageal food bolus impaction x14h, tolerating secretions but not liquids; anticoagulated on apixaban for AF; severe aortic stenosis (not a surgical candidate); prior EGD with erosive esophagitis.
flags: severe aortic stenosis — NOT a surgical candidate (no surgical rescue)
tolerating secretions (not currently an airway emergency)
